languages.text: "Не время спешить. Стоит лучше подготовиться к неизвестности, ждущей внизу".
"This is no time to be hasty. Better to be prepared for the unknown waiting below."
languages.original_text: "Не время спешить. Стоит лучше подготовиться к неизвестности, ждущей внизу".

traits.locale_text: "This is no time to be hasty. Better to be prepared for the unknown waiting below."
"This is no time to be hasty. Better to be prepared for the unknown waiting below."
"This is no time to be hasty. Better to be prepared for the unknown waiting below."

languages.text: “做好万全准备，不要仓促行事。我们不知道下面有什么在等着我们。”
languages.original_text: "This is no time to be hasty. Better to be prepared for the unknown waiting below."

traits.locale_text: “做好万全准备，不要仓促行事。我们不知道下面有什么在等着我们。”

languages.text: «Debemos andar con pies de plomo. No sabemos qué nos espera allí abajo».
languages.original_text: "This is no time to be hasty. Better to be prepared for the unknown waiting below."

traits.locale_text: «Debemos andar con pies de plomo. No sabemos qué nos espera allí abajo».

languages.text: « Ce n'est pas le moment de nous précipiter. Mieux vaut nous préparer à ce qui nous attend là en bas. »
languages.original_text: "This is no time to be hasty. Better to be prepared for the unknown waiting below."

traits.locale_text: « Ce n'est pas le moment de nous précipiter. Mieux vaut nous préparer à ce qui nous attend là en bas. »

languages.text: "Acele etmeyelim. Aşağıda bekleyen bilinmeyene karşı hazırlıklı olmamız daha iyi."
languages.original_text: "This is no time to be hasty. Better to be prepared for the unknown waiting below."

traits.locale_text: "Acele etmeyelim. Aşağıda bekleyen bilinmeyene karşı hazırlıklı olmamız daha iyi."

languages.text: "Wir dürfen nichts überstürzen. Wir müssen auf das Unerwartete vorbereitet sein, das dort unten wartet."
languages.original_text: "This is no time to be hasty. Better to be prepared for the unknown waiting below."

traits.locale_text: "Wir dürfen nichts überstürzen. Wir müssen auf das Unerwartete vorbereitet sein, das dort unten wartet."

languages.text: 「急ぐべき時ではない。未知のものを待つ下準備をすべきだ」
languages.original_text: "This is no time to be hasty. Better to be prepared for the unknown waiting below."

traits.locale_text: 「急ぐべき時ではない。未知のものを待つ下準備をすべきだ。」
